title: First Year Swedish 1
catalogDescription: Fundamentals of oral and written Swedish, including introductory study of literature, film, and other authentic texts. First in a sequence of three. Maximum 15 credits allowed between SWED 101; SWED 102; SWED 103; and SWED 150. Offered: A.
